{{Quote|An attack always warrants a counterattack, bosun!|Voss|<ref name="marvel61" />}}
[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Voss''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who commanded a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Voss's Star Destroyer was part of the [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]]'s "[[secret armada]]" tasked with transporting a rare and unique creature known as the [[teezl]] to the Imperial [[Coruscant/Legends|capital]]. En route, however, it was attacked by a small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Flying Bantha Squadron|squadron]] disguised in [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Taken by surprise, Voss ordered his crew to fire indiscriminately at their surroundings, wreaking havoc throughout the armada.<ref name="marvel61" />
